allow: PowerShell(node -e "const http = require\('http'\); const req = http.get\('http://localhost:8082', \(res\) => { console.log\('Status:', res.statusCode\); }\); req.on\('error', \(e\) => console.log\('Error:', e.message\)\); req.setTimeout\(5000, \(\) => { console.log\('Timeout'\); req.destroy\(\); }\);")
